signals.title: Sky/USDS TVL +29.1% in 30 days — fastest growing stablecoin protocol
signals.title_zh: Sky/USDS TVL 30天+29.1% — 增速最快稳定币协议
signals.why_it_matters: Sets benchmark for what institutional yield products can achieve at scale.
signals.why_it_matters_zh: 为机构收益产品规模化吸引力树立基准。
signals.business_impact: USDGO must target comparable TVL growth trajectory post-launch.
signals.business_impact_zh: USDGO 发布后必须瞄准可比增长轨迹。

signals.title: BitGo Q1 2026: institutional AUM +34% YoY — custody market expanding
signals.title_zh: BitGo Q1 2026：机构AUM同比+34% — 托管市场扩张
signals.why_it_matters: Institutional demand for digital asset custody outpacing market cap growth.
signals.why_it_matters_zh: 机构数字资产托管需求增速超过市值增长。
signals.business_impact: StableHub custody-adjacent services have growing addressable base.
signals.business_impact_zh: StableHub 托管相关服务可寻址基础扩大。

signals.title: Ethena sUSDe TVL -4.2% MoM — yield compression from funding rate decline
signals.title_zh: Ethena sUSDe TVL 月跌4.2% — 资金费率下降导致收益压缩
signals.why_it_matters: Ethena's yield model depends on funding rates; declining rates reduce appeal vs real-yield alternatives.
signals.why_it_matters_zh: Ethena 收益模型依赖资金费率，利率下降降低了相对于真实收益替代品的吸引力。
signals.business_impact: Reduces near-term competition pressure on USDGO yield targets.
signals.business_impact_zh: 近期降低了 USDGO 收益目标的竞争压力。

signals.title: Airwallex closes $120M Series F — cross-border payment scale accelerating
signals.title_zh: Airwallex 完成1.2亿美元F轮 — 跨境支付规模加速
signals.why_it_matters: Airwallex is OSL's #1 B2B target. Fresh capital means they will build or buy stablecoin rails — window to become preferred partner is now.
signals.why_it_matters_zh: Airwallex 是 OSL 最高优先级B2B目标，新融资意味着将自建或收购稳定币能力，成为其首选合作伙伴的窗口现在开放。
signals.business_impact: Weak confirmation that payment companies have payable stablecoin pain — 1 data point, need 29 more.
signals.business_impact_zh: 弱确认支付公司有可付费的稳定币痛点 — 1个数据点，还需要29个。
